course_expected_weights._note: Aronimink: par-70 bentgrass course, historically demanding small greens. APP elevated (1.30) — small greens, tight approach windows. ARG elevated (1.20) — Major rough penalties, false fronts. PUTT moderate (1.05) — bentgrass greens reward good putters. OTT moderate (1.10) — length matters but fairway positioning critical. Generic PGA Championship weights applied — no Aronimink-specific modern data.
